title: Guitar Hero World Tour wireless guitar (Xbox 360)
description: Xbox Guitar Hero console. X-box Guitar hero console .
itemDetails: Red Octane wireless Guitar Hero World Tour guitar controller for Microsoft Xbox 360 (model 95457.805; sunburst red-to-black metallic finish, white pickguard). Five coloured fret buttons (green/red/yellow/blue/orange), touch-sensitive neck slider strip (World Tour / GH5 era), strum bar, whammy bar, Star Power / Back button, Xbox guide-compatible D-pad cluster. 2.4 GHz wireless (receiver dongle not shown in hero). Manufacturer: Red Octane (Activision publishing era). Market: legacy rhythm-game peripheral; used sunburst units common on eBay. Note: game console, not a toy—electronics and switch repair typical.
